channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: google/tunix
item.description: A JAX-native LLM Post-Training Library

item.title: future-file-format/F3
item.description: [SIGMOD 2026] F3: The Open-Source Data File Format for the Future

item.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-maps
item.description: Map layout for Obsidian Bases. Display your notes as an interactive map view.

item.title: alibaba/Logics-Parsing
item.description: (no description)

item.title: chr15m/minimal-pwa
item.description: Minimal files + config for a PWA

item.title: neuphonic/neutts-air
item.description: On-device TTS model by Neuphonic

item.title: cjpais/Handy
item.description: A free, open source, and extensible speech-to-text application that works completely offline.

item.title: Kelsidavis/System7
item.description: (no description)

item.title: anthropics/claude-agent-sdk-python
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Inception3D/TTT3R
item.description: A simple state update rule to enhance length generalization for CUT3R.

item.title: StanfordBDHG/OpenTSLM
item.description: OpenTSLM: Time-Series Language Models for Reasoning over Multivariate Medical Text- and Time-Series Data

item.title: microsoft/agent-framework
item.description: A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Python and .NET.

item.title: thinking-machines-lab/tinker-cookbook
item.description: Post-training with Tinker

item.title: pathwaycom/bdh
item.description: Baby Dragon Hatchling (BDH) – Architecture and Code

item.title: volcengine/MineContext
item.description: MineContext is your proactive context-aware AI partner（Context-Engineering+ChatGPT Pulse）

item.title: atuinsh/desktop
item.description: 📖 Runbooks that run

item.title: ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp
item.description: Chrome DevTools for coding agents

item.title: sammyuri/craftgpt
item.description: Small language model built in Minecraft.

item.title: agentic-commerce-protocol/agentic-commerce-protocol
item.description: The Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP) is an interaction model and open standard for connecting buyers, their AI agents, and businesses to complete purchases seamlessly. The specification is currently maintained by OpenAI and Stripe.

item.title: evanw/miniffi
item.description: (no description)

item.title: mujocolab/mjlab
item.description: Isaac Lab API, powered by MuJoCo-Warp, for RL and robotics research.

item.title: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp
item.description: (no description)

item.title: juxtopposed/Mystical-Blue-Theme
item.description: KDE Plasma 6 Blue Theme

item.title: folke/sidekick.nvim
item.description: Your Neovim AI sidekick

item.title: Mega4alik/ollm
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanImage-3.0
item.description: HunyuanImage-3.0: A Powerful Native Multimodal Model for Image Generation

item.title: rxi/sj.h
item.description: A tiny little JSON parsing library

item.title: thu-ml/RDT2
item.description: Official code of RDT 2

item.title: MrTurvey/flareprox
item.description: Use Cloudflare to create HTTP pass-through proxies for unique IP rotation, similar to fireprox

item.title: trustedsec/Titanis
item.description: Windows protocol library, including SMB and RPC implementations, among others.
